news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Femasys Inc. (NASDAQ: FEMY) revealed plans for an underwritten public offering of its common stock in an effort to raise funds. The biomedical company, known for its innovations in women's health, aims to offer shares with an option for underwriters to acquire up to 15% additional shares. Furthermore, existing institutional stockholders alongside some directors and officers have shown intent to partake in a private placement by purchasing common stock. Femasys focuses on addressing unmet needs in women's health globally through a range of in-office therapeutic and diagnostic products.
news.headline: Femasys plans public stock offering and private placement with existing shareholders, granting underwriters option for more shares.

news.summary: Today in Las Vegas, Care Career, Inc. revealed the successful acquisition of four major healthcare staffing companies. This includes Alliant Personnel Resources in August 2024, Amare Medical Network, and MedUS Healthcare in March 2025. For further details, visit www.carecareer.com.
news.headline: Care Career, Inc. acquires 4 healthcare staffing firms in strategic move for growth. Includes Alliant Personnel Resources, Amare Medical Network, and MedUS Healthcare.

news.summary: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: FERG; LSE: FERG) declared a dividend of $0.83 per share on May 29, 2025. The dividend payment timetable is as follows: Ex-dividend date is June 20, 2025, record date is June 20, 2025, currency election deadline for Depositary Interest holders is July 9, 2025, and the payment date is set for August 6, 2025. The completion of cross-border share movements between the U.K. and the U.S. is subject to further verification.
news.headline: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. declares $0.83 per share dividend on May 29, 2025. Payment date set for August 6, 2025.

news.summary: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV), a top commercial landscaping services firm in the U.S., revealed that its management personnel will be present at upcoming investor conferences. On June 3, 2025, Dale Asplund, President and CEO, alongside Chris Stoczko, VP of Finance & Investor Relations, will be at the William Blair 2025 Investor Conference in Chicago, Illinois. The session is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.headline: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) to attend William Blair 2025 Investor Conference on June 3 in Chicago at 10:00 a.m. ET. Dale Asplund and Chris Stoczko to represent the company.

news.summary: Legislation A.B. 343 is set to convert a Trump executive order into state law in Carson City, Nevada. PatientRightsAdvocate.org is calling on Governor Joe Lombardo to endorse this bill, which aims to provide hospital price transparency to residents of Nevada. The legislation has been approved and is now awaiting the governor's signature. This development occurred on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: PatientRightsAdvocate.org urges Gov. Lombardo to sign A.B. 343 for hospital price transparency in Nevada.

news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, Universal Corporation (NYSE: UVV), a worldwide agriproducts company, revealed its financial achievements for the full fiscal year and fourth quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. Preston D. Wigner, who serves as the Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer of Universal, highlighted the success of the company in the fiscal year 2025. He mentioned that they effectively implemented their business strategy, leading to a rise in revenue and operating income on a consolidated level.
news.headline: Universal Corporation (NYSE: UVV) reports fiscal year 2025 results with increased revenue and operating income.

news.summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE:BFA,BFB) based in Louisville, Ky., has finalized its Request for Proposal (RFP) process for portfolio distribution in specific regions throughout the U.S. By selecting new distributors for 13 markets, the company is set to partner with seven fresh distribution organizations. It will continue working with its current distributor network in the markets not included in the RFP. This strategic move entails significant changes in distribution partnerships for the company in key markets.
news.headline: Brown-Forman reevaluates US distribution; 13 markets shift to new distributors, 7 new orgs involved. Maintains current network.

news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Philip Morris International Inc.'s U.S. division has named Peter Diatelevi as Chief Sales and Distribution Officer. Diatelevi will report to Chief Commercial Officer Seth Kaufman and join the PMI U.S. Commercial Leadership Team. He takes over from Paul Sammartino, who will retire this summer. The company extends its appreciation for Sammartino’s leadership.
news.headline: PMI U.S. appoints Peter Diatelevi as Chief Sales and Distribution Officer; retiree Paul Sammartino thanked for service.

news.summary: California Water Service Group's leading subsidiary, listed under NYSE as CWT, recently finalized deals to purchase the water utility assets of two systems.
news.headline: California Water Service to acquire Casa Loma Water Company, Palm Mutual Water Company assets in agreements. (including possible numbers)

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Elkhart, Indiana, THOR Industries, Inc. (NYSE: THO) shared plans for their management team to engage in an investor conference. The team will conduct a fireside chat and hold individual meetings with analysts and institutional investors at the event.
news.headline: THOR Industries (NYSE: THO) to partake in investor conference, hosting fireside chat and meetings.

news.summary: Today, Regency Centers Corporation disclosed that their management team will be participating in the Nareit REITweek Investor Conference on June 3, 2025, at 3:15 pm ET. The presentation can be accessed through a webcast link available on the Investor Relations page of the Company’s website at investors.regencycenters.com. The event, taking place in Jacksonville, Fla., marks an important step for Regency Centers (Nasdaq:REG) in engaging with investors.
news.headline: Regency Centers to present at Nareit REITweek 2025 Investor Conference on June 3, 2025, at 3:15 pm ET.

news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, Microchip Technology Incorporated, a top provider of smart, connected, and secure embedded control solutions, has revised its guidance for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, ending on June 30, 2025. The company now anticipates consolidated net sales to range between $1.045 billion and $1.070 billion, compared to the previous range of $1.025 billion to $1.070 billion announced on May 8, 2025. The updated forecast for GAAP loss per share is projected to fall between $(0.11) and $(0.07), while non-GAAP earnings per share are expected to be in the range of $0.22 and $0.26. The initial guidance had indicated a GAAP loss per share between $(0.15) and $(0.07), and non-GAAP earnings per share ranging from $0.18 to $0.26.
news.headline: Microchip Technology raises Q1 FY26 guidance: sales now $1.045B - $1.07B, GAAP EPS $(0.11) - $(0.07), non-GAAP EPS $0.22 - $0.26.

news.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc., a real estate investment trust, headquartered in Vero Beach, Florida, disclosed on May 29, 2025, the cash dividend scheduled for June 2025 for its Common Stock. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbols ARR and ARR-PRC.
news.headline: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. declares dividend rate for June 2025 common shares.

news.summary: CooperCompanies announced its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ended April 30, 2025. The revenue increased by 6% year-over-year to $1,002.3 million, with CooperVision revenue up 5% to $669.6 million and CooperSurgical revenue up 8% to $332.7 million. The GAAP diluted earnings per share was $0.44, while the non-GAAP diluted EPS was $0.96, up by 14% from the previous year. During the quarter, the company repurchased $40.6 million of common stock. The fiscal year 2025 financial guidance includes total revenue of $4,107 - $4,146 million and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $4.05 - $4.11. The company provided a reconciliation of selected GAAP results to non-GAAP results to help investors understand their consolidated operating performance. These results are not meant to substitute GAAP measures but to be used in conjunction with them.
news.headline: CooperCompanies' Q2 2025 revenue increased 6% YoY to $1,002.3M, CVI revenue up 5% to $669.6M, CSI revenue up 8% to $332.7M. Non-GAAP EPS increased 14% to $0.96. Financial guidance includes FY 2025 revenue of $4,107-4,146M. Keep updated on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Virtu Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: VIRT), a prominent global provider of financial services, revealed intentions to shift the listing of its Class A Common Stock to the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. Virtu Financial offers liquidity and transparent products in various asset classes across the investment cycle to global markets. This move signifies a strategic decision by the company to align itself with the NYSE, a significant player in the stock exchange sector.
news.headline: Virtu Financial to transfer listing from Nasdaq to NYSE, improving visibility. (Total characters: 74)

news.summary: In the latest announcement, it has been reported that there has been a decline in global carbon dioxide emissions by about 7% in 2020, reaching a total of approximately 34 billion metric tons. This substantial decrease is mainly attributed to the restrictions imposed worldwide due to the COVID-19 pandemic, leading to reduced industrial activities and transportation. The decline marks the largest decrease in carbon emissions since World War II. Despite this positive development, experts emphasize the need for continued efforts to combat climate change and work towards achieving sustainable emission levels in the future.
news.headline: Palomar Holdings, Inc. successfully completes June 1 reinsurance placement.

news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation has reported its operating results for the third quarter and first 36 weeks of fiscal year 2025. Net sales saw a notable increase, with $61.96 billion in the quarter (up 8.0% from last year) and $185.48 billion for the year-to-date period (up 8.2% from last year). The company also noted a rise in net income, reaching $1.90 billion for the quarter and $5.49 billion for the first 36 weeks. Costco currently operates 905 warehouses globally and has seen significant growth in e-commerce sales as well. A conference call is scheduled to discuss the results, with cautionary statements regarding forward-looking projections due to various economic and operational factors.
news.headline: Costco reports Q3 net sales increase of 8.0% to $61.96B, YTD sales up 8.2% to $185.48B. Q3 net income $1.90B, YTD net income $5.49B. (959)

news.headline: Sealed Air (NYSE: SEE) declares $0.20 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: In Dothan, Alabama on May 29, 2025, Construction Partners, Inc. publicly traded as NASDAQ: ROAD, a civil infrastructure firm, shared that they specialize in constructing and upkeeping roads in Sunbelt markets. The company, also known as CPI, is pleased to reveal this information.
news.headline: Construction Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROAD) wins Silver Telly Award for "Follow the Rock" production. A Civil infrastructure company specializing in the Sunbelt region.

news.summary: Valcourt, Quebec, May 29, 2025 - BRP Inc. conducted its annual and special shareholder meeting today in a virtual setting. The event was live-streamed and will soon be viewable on the company's website. BRP Inc. trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol DOO and on the NASDAQ as DOOO. Stay tuned for more updates.
news.headline: BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOOO) held its annual meeting virtually on May 29, 2025. Meeting details recorded.

news.summary: In a recent update on May 29, 2025, Medallion Bank, an FDIC-insured institution, shared its plan to redeem all existing shares of its Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series F (Nasdaq: MBNKP) on July 1, 2025 (the “Redemption Date”). The redemption will be executed at a set price of $25.00 per share (the “Redemption Price”). Medallion Bank is known for providing consumer loans for recreational vehicles, boats, and home improvements, as well as offering loan origination services to fintech partners.
news.headline: Medallion Bank to redeem all Series F Preferred Stock shares on July 1, 2025 for $25.00 each.

news.summary: In comparison to the previous year, there was a 2% rise in net sales, along with a corresponding increase of 2% in comparable sales, marking the 9th straight quarter of advancing market share. The operating margin showed significant progress, reaching 7.5%, which represented a surge of 140 basis points from the prior year. Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments also saw positive growth, reaching $2.2 billion, a 28% increase from the previous year. This information was disclosed from San Francisco.
news.headline: Gap Inc. reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results: Net sales up 2%, comp sales up 2%, operating margin improves to 7.5%, $2.2B in cash.

news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a prominent figure in agentic automation, shared its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 which concluded on April 30, 2025. The company reported an Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) of $1.693 billion, demonstrating a 12% increase compared to the previous year. Daniel Dines, the Founder and CEO of UiPath, expressed contentment with the results, attributing the growth to enhanced operational efficiency and the substantial return on investment that customers are experiencing with their automation platform.
news.headline: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) Q1 fiscal 2026 results show ARR of $1.693 billion, up 12% YoY. CEO Daniel Dines pleased with improved execution.
